title: Discover Your Customer
theme: FEC guided start — Customer Segment, Problem, Value Proposition

learn.label: Learn
learn.headline: Your dreams deserve a plan — next is your customer
learn.summary: Week 1 started with YOU. Week 2 introduces the first three FEC building blocks — customer before solution.
bullets: FEC progress: YOU (Week 1) → Customer Segment, Problem, Value Proposition (this week) → full canvas (Week 3)
Bring your future-self letter and one dream photo from Week 1
Define who you would genuinely love to help — not everyone
Name their urgent problem before designing any solution
learn.callout: Read before class. Your coach connects your Dream Board to the people you will serve.

workshop.label: Workshop
workshop.headline: Customer discovery lab
workshop.summary: Facilitated FEC intro work using your Week 1 vision as the starting point.
bullets: Share one Dream Board insight and who it points you toward serving
Draft interview questions with your squad
Map early hypotheses: segment, urgent problem, first value proposition
workshop.callout: Mark complete after your classroom session.

assignment.label: Assignment
assignment.headline: FEC guided start — three building blocks
assignment.summary: Complete Customer Segment, Customer Problem, and Value Proposition in the guided wizard. The rest of the canvas unlocks in Week 3.
bullets: Who do I want to serve?
What important problem do they face?
How will I help solve that problem?

reflection.label: Reflection
reflection.headline: What did you learn about your market?
prompts: Who surprised you as a potential client?
What problem feels most urgent to solve?
How does this customer connect to the life you want to build?

submit.label: Submit
submit.headline: Mark Week 2 complete
submit.summary: Unlock Week 3 — the rest of your Financial Entrepreneurship Canvas.
bullets: Ready to continue the canvas in Week 3
